DeterministicConclusion: Fault follows DIMM module (not slot): swap did not reduce WHEA storm materially
BestNextDecision: Replace DIMM module immediately; keep badmemorylist active until replacement verification
AntiRegression: Do not disable badmemorylist until post-replacement WHEA <= 50/10min for 24h
Rollback: If instability after replacement, restore old module and keep current badmemorylist
